goal: Stabilize external CUDA operator packet verification so a commit-pinned packet does not warn merely because the current checkout advanced after the packet handoff source commit.
head: bf74454
blocked_scope: Changing model catalog pins, hashes, or release acceptance policy
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only update external CUDA operator packet verifier warning policy, its focused tests, refreshed packet verification evidence, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD contract.
required_commands: rg -n -- "packet_handoff_source_commit.*65dfd1a|verified 17 required file blobs at 65dfd1a|test_verifier_does_not_warn_when_current_checkout_is_after_packet_commit|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint" scripts/verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py tests/scripts/test_verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet_verification.json docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
required_evidence: Verifier still validates packet.git.head resolves to a commit.
Verifier still validates required committed file hashes in the current checkout and required file blobs at packet.git.head.
Verifier does not warn only because current HEAD advanced after the packet handoff source commit.
Refreshed packet verification warnings are empty at current HEAD bf74454.
Docs state that v0/M6 remain NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
executed_verification_commands: rg -n -- "packet_handoff_source_commit.*65dfd1a|verified 17 required file blobs at 65dfd1a|test_verifier_does_not_warn_when_current_checkout_is_after_packet_commit|real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint" scripts/verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py tests/scripts/test_verify_external_cuda_operator_packet.py artifacts/review/external_cuda_operator_packet_verification.json docs/CONTEXT.md docs/WORKING.md .codex/tasks/current.json
warnings: This gate does not produce real trained adapter evidence or run CUDA training.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Keep the external CUDA packet commit-pinned to the handoff source while removing the structurally recurring warning caused by subsequent closeout commits.
phase_notes.audit: Current verifier returns GO but warns that checkout HEAD bf74454 differs from packet handoff source commit 65dfd1a; required commit blobs are already verified at 65dfd1a.
phase_notes.build: Update verifier warning policy and focused tests, then refresh packet verification evidence and LLM handoff docs.
phase_notes.check: Run JSON checks, focused verifier tests, py_compile, packet verification, warning-empty assertion, evidence search, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this warning-policy stabilization phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Stabilize external CUDA operator packet verifier warning policy, update focused tests, refreshed verification artifact, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema changes, no catalog pin changes, no release acceptance weakening, no M6 GO docs, no model/adapter/Docker/evidence bundle commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
